Place your activity screenshots in this folder using these exact filenames (PNG recommended):

  discernment-worksheet.png   — Discernment panel (three Q&A responses)
  beyond-myself.png           — What is beyond myself / personal record
  manresa-reflection.png      — Ignatian reflection (Manresa / consolations & desolations)
  pursuit-happyness.png       — The Pursuit of Happyness film reflection

Paths in the site: ./images/activities/<filename>
